pause_reason: Context exhaustion at 92% after planning + verification. Execution not yet started.

completed_tasks.name: Create VALIDATION.md from research validation architecture
Spawn gsd-planner — created 3 plans in 3 waves

remaining_tasks.name: Phase 6: Distribution and Polish (FloxHub publish + Nix)

decisions.decision: Phase 3 split into 3 plans / 3 waves (matches Phase 2 pattern)
decisions.rationale: Shell generators → runtime wiring → subprocess integration tests; clean Wave 1 → Wave 2 → Wave 3 dependency chain

decisions.decision: Fix bash reference prefix-match bug in fs-filter.sh port (use '<path>|<path>/*' pattern instead of bash '<path>*' over-match)
decisions.rationale: Kernel tier is the backstop; false positives in shell tier are safer than the /tmp over-matches /tmp-foo false negative. Research Open Question 1 accepted.

decisions.decision: Symlink bin creation deferred to entrypoint.sh runtime (not Go-side)
decisions.rationale: $FLOX_ENV only defined after flox activate; Go generates the template, entrypoint.sh does the ln -sf loop. Matches bash reference exactly.

decisions.decision: exec_test.go Phase 2 argv tests will be rewritten in Plan 03-02 Task 1
decisions.rationale: D-01/D-02 change the flox-activate argv shape (bash --rcfile / bash -c 'source && exec'). Breaking change for TestBuildSandboxExecArgs_Interactive and _WithUserCommand — flagged during planning so executor will handle.

next_action: Run `/clear` then `/gsd:autonomous --from 3` — workflow will detect Phase 3 has plans, skip research/planning, spawn executors for waves 1→2→3, then continue phases 4→5→6 and milestone lifecycle.
context_notes: Phase 3 is FULLY PLANNED and VERIFIED — zero planning work remaining. The 3 plans (03-01 generators, 03-02 wiring/argv rewrite, 03-03 subprocess integration) cover all 8 SHELL-XX requirements with unit + integration tests. The plan-checker confirmed all 10 verification dimensions pass. Next session needs only execution. The --no-transition flag was used when invoking execute-phase from autonomous so executor returns status to parent. No blockers. Context was exhausted before any executor was spawned, so no partial commits exist.
